name: 13" Trailing Plant in Wood Planter - Threshold™
description:
Bring the natural beauty of the outdoors into your home with this Trailing Plant in Wood Planter from Threshold™. The lifelike trailing plant is housed inside a white stoneware pot with faux soil filler to add a vibrant finish to your year-round decorations, and the wood planter offers an elevated display. Place it in the entryway or living room with other potted plants to lend a welcoming vibe to your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
